name: Whole Wheat Sourdough
recipeInstructions:
I used the whole wheat starter and experimented with your whole wheat bread recipe in the DAK today. It turned out great. Basically, I halved your recipe and added a few things. My DAK is a 3-cup flour model; yours is? If using whole wheat or rye flour, add more flour because it doesn't rise as much. Also, when using whole wheat, etc., add vital wheat gluten and lecithin to aid elasticity and help it rise. This is what I put in the DAK and the order:
1. Set the light/dark setting to 12 o'clock.
2. Set the menu to Sweet Bread (auto mode).
3. Add 3/4 cup pecans (use walnuts if available). Use large pieces as they are cut up during mixing.
4. Experiment with adding raisins, oatmeal, or seeds.
Have you tried it? Let me know what you add or subtract. I have some beer starter to share when we get together, but the whole wheat starter is great!
